name: 私人公寓對質
description: Richard闖入Michelle的公寓質問出軌，密閉空間內的對質將兩人的矛盾推向極致，私密場景讓情感衝突更加赤裸和激烈。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: You're having an affair. ... Are you sleeping with him? Tell me what does he have that I don't have? ... Where were you, Richard? The last 3 years when I was working myself to the bone for you and your family.
examples.context: Richard闖入Michelle的公寓質問出軌，密閉空間內的對質將兩人的矛盾推向極致，私密場景讓情感衝突更加赤裸和激烈。
